sentiment.reasoning: Securing a large $650M contract provides immediate revenue visibility and long-term growth potential.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods begins scheduled maintenance of automated logistics systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity with minimal impact on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
